title: Civilisation Pack
description: Modrinth import of modpack from CurseForge, with additional enhancement mods.
body:
# **Important note, please allocate at least 8GB of RAM for this to run correctly**


# **Modded Minecraft Server – Prunian Empire and Surrounding Nations**

Join a modded Minecraft server where the Prunian Empire serves as the dominant power, with smaller nations developing around it.

Players can engage in roleplay, company management, nation creation, political interaction, and city-building. The server emphasizes nation-building mechanics—including industry, politics, and infrastructure—but also allows for independent gameplay outside these systems.

The modpack is centered on Create and its extensions, focusing on engineering and industrial development. Additional mods like Chipped and McGraw’s architecture support more detailed and creative building styles.

The Overworld uses custom terrain generation via Larion, offering a visually realistic and expansive environment.

to join the discord, please be 16+: [Discord](https://discord.gg/qxvaEbXrMN)


#
A thoughtfully curated modpack built for both server and solo play, **Civilization, Industry, and Architecture** focuses on a balanced modded Minecraft experience without overwhelming complexity. This pack is ideal for players who enjoy immersive building, light automation, and cooperative play, whether you're crafting intricate machines or simply decorating your homestead.

Originally released on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/civilization-industry-and-architecture), this version is published for Modrinth users who prefer this platform.

# 
#  🏛 Purpose

Designed for community-based servers and smaller groups, this pack encourages a sense of progress and collaboration. Whether you're constructing a grand village, starting a farming empire, or automating resource gathering, you'll find a feature set that supports creativity without sacrificing simplicity or performance.

# 🔧 Key Features

* **Create** – Core tech mod for mechanical automation and infrastructure building
* **Farmer’s Delight** – Add depth to food and farming with crops, meals, and kitchenware
* **Chipped, Macaw’s mods, & Domum Ornamentum** – A collection of building mods that massively expand your palette and creativity
* **Corpse** – Retrieve your items safely after death with gravestones
* **Simple Voice Chat** – Built-in proximity voice chat for immersive multiplayer
* **Create: Recycle Everything** – Smelt down leftovers and waste into usable components

# 🎯 Why Play This Pack?

* Performance-conscious — perfect for mid-tier systems and servers
* No bloated tech trees or overwhelming progression systems
* Built for fun, creativity, and collaboration — great for casual or roleplay-focused servers
* Easy to get into, hard to put down


### External mod links
- [Corpse](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse)
- [Simple voice chat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-voice-chat)
- [Create recycle everything](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-recycle-everything)
